x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Application health data enables DEX AI to diagnose app-specific issues such as Zoom quality and Office 365 performance. Without application monitoring, DEX AI diagnosis is limited to OS-level signals only.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure application monitoring in DEX for key business applications (Zoom, Office 365, browser-based apps). Application health data is required for DEX AI skills like Zoom call quality diagnosis and application performance analysis.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_0bf85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c78
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Application health data enables DEX AI to diagnose app-specific issues such as Zoom quality and Office 365 performance. Without application monitoring, DEX AI diagnosis is limited to OS-level signals only.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Application Health Monitoring</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addDaysUTC(-30);

    var ga = new GlideAggregate('dex_ci_application_device_data');
    ga.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' application health records collected in last 30 days';

    if (count >= 500) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' application health records in the last 30 days. DEX AI has sufficient application performance data for AI-driven diagnosis of app-related issues.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' application health records in the last 30 days (target: 500+). Limited application monitoring coverage will reduce DEX AI diagnosis accuracy for app-related issues.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' application health records in the last 30 days. DEX AI application diagnosis skills (Zoom, Office 365, browser performance) require active application health monitoring data.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>DEX</module><number>CHK0000521</number><order/><remediation_guidance>Configure application monitoring in DEX for key business applications (Zoom, Office 365, browser-based apps). Application health data is required for DEX AI skills like Zoom call quality diagnosis and application performance analysis.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>0bf85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c78</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Application Health Monitoring</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_0bf85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c78</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
